/payments.notes: Drain clearing — tenant responsible per lease

/maintenance.title: Leaking kitchen faucet
/maintenance.description: Kitchen faucet has a steady drip. Started 2 days ago.

/maintenance.title: HVAC not heating
/maintenance.description: Heating system blowing cold air. Thermostat set to 72°F but actual temp is 58°F.

/maintenance.title: Electrical outlet not working
/maintenance.description: Living room outlet on south wall is dead. Tried different devices and breaker reset.

/maintenance.title: Ant infestation in kitchen
/maintenance.description: Large number of ants found around kitchen cabinets and sink area.

/maintenance.title: Broken ceiling light fixture
/maintenance.description: Fluorescent light fixture in main workspace area is flickering and buzzing.

/maintenance.title: Water heater making noise
/maintenance.description: Water heater is making loud banging noises. Also takes longer to heat water.

/maintenance.title: Dishwasher not draining
/maintenance.description: Dishwasher fills but won't drain. Water sits at the bottom after cycle.

/maintenance.title: Emergency: Water leak from ceiling
/maintenance.description: Water is actively dripping from ceiling near entrance. May be from upstairs plumbing.

/maintenance.title: Conference room AC not cooling
/maintenance.description: AC in conference room not reaching set temperature. Clients are uncomfortable.

/maintenance.title: Garage door opener malfunction
/maintenance.description: Garage door opener motor runs but door only opens halfway.

/maintenance.title: Bathroom exhaust fan noisy
/maintenance.description: Exhaust fan in bathroom making grinding noise when running.

/maintenance.title: Cracks in bedroom wall
/maintenance.description: Hairline cracks appearing along bedroom wall near window. Possible settling.

/inspections.findings: Minor wall damage in living room. Carpet needs professional cleaning. Kitchen in good condition.
Water damage confirmed from upstairs unit. Ceiling tiles damaged. Emergency plumbing repair ordered. Follow-up required after repair.
All units in good condition. Minor exterior paint peeling on unit 2B. Roof shingles show normal wear. Gutters clean.
HVAC system failing. Unit needs full HVAC replacement. Mold check recommended. Tenant temporarily relocated for maintenance work.
